sanskrit:
सर्वभूतस्थमात्मानं सर्वभूतानि चात्मनि ।
ईक्षते योगयुक्तात्मा सर्वत्र समदर्शनः ॥
transliteration:
sarva-bhūta-stham ātmānaṃ sarva-bhūtāni cātmani |
īkṣate yoga-yuktātmā sarvatra sama-darśanaḥ ||
literal_meaning: The yoga-united self sees the Self abiding in all beings and all beings in the Self; everywhere he beholds the same.
contextual_meaning: A mind stabilized in yoga transcends the subject-object split; the same awareness that knows 'I am' is recognized in every creature, dissolving tribal and self-other boundaries.
psychological_state: Post-egoic, panoramic awareness; reduction of implicit bias and dehumanization tendencies.
trigger_scenario: Scrolling past a newsfeed of political out-group suffering and suddenly feeling 'they are me' rather than 'those people'.
anchor_text: See your own awareness shining in every creature, dissolving all separation.
